metadata.title: AutoFixablePattern — runtime transfer object for remediation map entries

description: Maps an audit check_id pattern to an autonomous action handler at runtime (src/shared/models/remediation.py). AutoFixablePattern is a runtime transfer object only — the authoritative remediation map lives in .intent/enforcement/mappings/remediation/auto_remediation.yaml. This class ferries entries from that YAML into the self-healing pipeline. risk_level is a bare str with comment-documented values {low, medium, high} — not an enum; reconciliation with the risk vocabulary cluster (5 surfaces) is a governor decision. confidence is a float in [0.0, 1.0] expressing pattern match reliability. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.

check_id_pattern.description: Rule/check ID from an audit finding. Exact match or prefix* wildcard. Matched against AuditFinding.check_id at runtime.

action_handler.description: AtomicAction identifier that can fix violations matching this pattern. e.g. 'fix.imports'.

confidence.description: Pattern match reliability in [0.0, 1.0]. Patterns below the configured confidence threshold are not applied autonomously.

risk_level.description: Risk classification for applying this fix. Values: low, medium, high (comment-documented, not enum). Reconciliation with risk vocabulary cluster pending governor decision.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this pattern fixes and why.
